info: Kick-off: 19h30 sharp — away team warm-ups before 19h30
Match format: 7 matches (6 singles + 1 doubles), best of 5 games
Order of play: H1vV1, H2vV2, H3vV3, Doubles, H1vV2, H3vV1, H2vV3
Doubles: H3 & partner vs V3 & partner
Team: max 4 players — 3 play 2 singles each, 2 play doubles
Scorecards: submit to captains WhatsApp group after match — deadline Sunday 4pm
Late scorecard fine: R150 per team
Late arrival: forfeit 1 match per 15 min from 19h30, full forfeit at 20h30 (R200 fine)
2-player team: forfeit H3/V3 matches + doubles, R150 fine — can still win if winning all 4 singles
Full walkover (no-show): R200 fine, 0 pts for defaulting team
Substitutions: from lower division only, max 5 per season, cup-tied on 6th match
No subs allowed weeks 1, 16, 17, 18 — no new registrations weeks 16, 17, 18
Club colours required — R50 fine per offence
ITTF approved balls only — brand nominated by CTTT at M&R meeting
